200# return «

User rating: item not rated yet

Fighter type: Tank

Introduced in: Special offer

 

Write a review Send to Discord

Rate this item


description 2/6

Once in a while, the Executioner of Darkness starts to accumulate incoming damage for 5 sec. One of the following effects is triggered, based on the amount of damage accumulated: - If the accumulated damage is less than 20% of the Executioner of Darkness’ max health, they scare a random enemy for 1 sec. - If the accumulated damage is greater than 20% of the Executioner of Darkness max health, they scare 3 enemies for 1 sec.

description 4/6

Once in a while, the Executioner of Darkness starts to accumulate incoming damage for 5 sec. One of the following effects is triggered, based on the amount of damage accumulated: - If the accumulated damage is less than 20% of the Executioner of Darkness’ max health, they scare a random enemy for 1 sec. - If the accumulated damage is greater than 20% of the Executioner of Darkness max health, they scare 3 enemies for 1 sec. - If the accumulated damage is greater than 40% of the Executioner of Darkness’ max health, they scare all enemies for 2 sec. Whenever the Executioner of Darkness casts fear on an enemy, they increase physical and magic armor to themself and all allies by 2% until the end of the battle. Stacks up to 10 times. Whenever the Executioner of Darkness scares an enemy, they deal pure damage equal to 2% of the target’s max health.

description 6/6

Once in a while, the Executioner of Darkness starts to accumulate incoming damage for 5 sec. One of the following effects is triggered, based on the amount of damage accumulated: - If the accumulated damage is less than 20% of the Executioner of Darkness’ max health, they scare a random enemy for 1 sec. - If the accumulated damage is greater than 20% of the Executioner of Darkness max health, they scare 3 enemies for 1 sec. - If the accumulated damage is greater than 40% of the Executioner of Darkness’ max health, they scare all enemies for 2 sec. - If the accumulated damage is greater than 60% of the Executioner of Darkness’ max health, they scare all enemies for 2 sec and increase damage dealt to them by 30% for 2 sec. Whenever the Executioner of Darkness casts fear on an enemy, they increase physical and magic armor to themself and all allies by 5 % until the end of the battle. Stacks up to 20 times. Whenever the Executioner of Darkness scares an enemy, they deal pure damage e


Substance of Chaos

description 2/6

For the duration of the battle, when the Executioner of Darkness attacks a scared enemy, the Executioner of Darkness deals additional damage equal to 100% of their attack.

description 4/6

For the duration of the battle, when the Executioner of Darkness attacks a scared enemy, the Executioner of Darkness deals additional damage equal to 100% of their attack. Instead of dealing pure damage based on the target’s max health when inflicting fear, the Executioner of Darkness tears through the target’s armor. When the enemy’s is torn, that enemy takes 100000 pure damage and has their physical armor reduced by 20% for 5 sec. Stacks up to 3 times. The enemy also takes 200000 physical damage for 5 sec.

description 6/6

For the duration of the battle, when the Executioner of Darkness attacks a scared enemy, the Executioner of Darkness deals additional damage equal to 100% of their attack. Instead of dealing pure damage based on the target’s max health when inflicting fear, the Executioner of Darkness tears through the target’s armor. When the enemy’s is torn, that enemy takes 200000 pure damage and has their physical armor reduced by 25% for 5 sec. Stacks up to 3 times. The enemy also takes 300000 physical damage for 5 sec. When fear wears off, the Executioner of Darkness steals 10% of physical and magic armor of that unit for 5 sec.


Substance of Greatness

description 2/6

While the Executioner of Darkness accumulates damage, they restore 500000 health.

description 4/6

While the Executioner of Darkness accumulates damage, they restore 500000 health. When fear wears off, the Executioner of Darkness steals 20% of physical and magic armor of that unit for 4 sec.

description 6/6

While the Executioner of Darkness accumulates damage, they restore 500000 health. When fear wears off, the Executioner of Darkness steals 20% of physical and magic armor of that unit for 4 sec. When the Executioner of Darkness plunges all enemies into darkness, they restore health to all allies equal to 100% of the Executioner’s physical armor for 5 sec and increase healing received by all allies by 30% for 5 sec. If an ally takes lethal damage during this time, they don’t die but continue to fight to the Executioner of Darkness’ side for 3 more sec.


Substance of Harmony

description 2/6

Enemies frightened by the Executioner of Darkness have their physical and magic armor reduced by 20% for 4 sec. Stacks up to 3 times.

description 4/6

Enemies frightened by the Executioner of Darkness have their physical and magic armor reduced by 20% for 4 sec. Stacks up to 3 times. Whenever the Executioner of Darkness casts fear on an enemy, they increase fortitude and dodge to themself and all allies by 5% until the end of the battle. Stacks up to 10 times.

description 6/6

Enemies frightened by the Executioner of Darkness have their physical and magic armor reduced by 20% for 4 sec. Stacks up to 3 times. Whenever the Executioner of Darkness casts fear on an enemy, they increase fortitude and dodge to themself and all allies by 7% until the end of the battle. Stacks up to 10 times. When the Executioner of Darkness plunges enemies into darkness, they increase the damage off all allies by 25% and reduce damage incoming damage by 25% for 5 sec.

Materials

Driving Force
Mask of Darkness
